identity.name: Credential Dumping — /etc/shadow and Mimipenguin

identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-EDR-001. Plane: EDR. Primary technique: T1003.008. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-EDR-001.
UC: Endpoint Credential Theft Detection / TC: Linux Credential Harvesting.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-EDR-001 requirements.

expected_artifacts.description: File access pattern matching '/etc/passwd' (Linux account database) (heuristic from scenario step step-01)
File access pattern matching '/etc/shadow' (Linux credential file) (heuristic from scenario step step-02)
File access pattern matching 'id_rsa' (SSH private key) (heuristic from scenario step step-03)
Process execution matching mimipenguin (heuristic from scenario step step-05)
Process execution matching curl (heuristic from scenario step step-05)
Outbound HTTP(S) request from the scenario step
